name: Chicken Tortilla Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 Chicken breasts; cooked, cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut or tear the tortillas into 1-inch squares.
2. Place half of them at the bottom of a baking dish and cover with half of the cheese.
3. Mix together the salsa, both soups, and cooked chicken.
4. Add half of this mixture to the baking dish.
5. Repeat steps 2-4, then top with the remaining cheese.
6. Cover and refrigerate for 24 hours.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes. Uncover for the last 15 minutes to brown.
